description: Out-of-scope (psychotic-spectrum, canonical): description points clearly to psychotic-spectrum territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'psychotic-spectrum'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: Lately I've been hearing things that I'm pretty sure aren't really there — like someone calling my name when no one is around. I also keep getting this feeling that I'm being watched, even when I know I'm alone in my apartment. It's hard to focus on anything else and I'm scared to tell people.
